case_title: ANGELO F. CATTANEO VS. BENJAMIN PINA-VERTIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-01-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY CATTANEO, ANGELO F. AS TO DEFENDANT PINA-VERTIN, BENJAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
